name: Cargo vessel struck by projectile near Oman
note: Vessel hit on a UN-approved route; the IMO paused its Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan.

name: IRGC seizes tanker near Larak Island
note: Fast boats boarded and diverted a tanker toward Bandar Abbas.

name: IRGC fast-boat harassment of shipping
note: Swarm of fast attack craft shadowed transiting vessels.

name: Drone strike on tanker in the Gulf of Oman
note: One-way attack drone struck a laden tanker; fire contained.

name: Widespread GPS spoofing off Bandar Abbas
note: Vessels reported position jumps and AIS disruption.

name: Suspected limpet-mine damage to hull
note: Vessel reported an explosion at the waterline; no casualties.

name: Tanker goes AIS-dark near Qeshm
note: A sanctioned-flag tanker switched off its transponder mid-strait.

name: Houthi Red Sea ban raises Hormuz risk
note: Spillover from the Red Sea crisis as insurers reprice Gulf transits.

name: Naval escort convoy formed for tankers
note: Multinational escorts began shepherding merchant traffic.

name: US strikes Iranian fast boats near Hormuz
note: US 'self-defense' strikes on launchers and boats.
